title: . Who are liable when committed by other than natural person. If the offense is committed by a
content:
. Who are liable when committed by other than natural person. If the offense is committed by a 
corporation, trust, firm, partnership, association or any other entity, the penalty shall be imposed upon the 
guilty officer or officers of such corporation, trust, firm, partnership, association or entity. 
Title II 
PRESCRIPTION OF OFFENSES AND CLAIMS
